title: The Sound of Far Away
tagline: Name a coastline and hear the live wind and surf breathing back from that edge of the world.
holy_shit: You can close your eyes and listen to what the coast is doing right now — synthesized live from real wind and wave data, with no backend.
powered_by: Open-Meteo wind + marine reads through a pinned /track extract cell, mapped in-browser into procedural surf, rumble, gusts, and a breathing horizon.
weld: Transplants taste-the-weather's verify-before-exec live fetch pattern and gravity-organ's browser-only Web Audio canvas loop, then welds them so real coastal wind/wave values shape a quiet ambient soundscape.
agent_scenario: When you need a restrained no-backend sonification page where live external conditions become a continuous ambient presence, not a numeric dashboard.
author: kody-w + Copilot
